value: Create one clean immutable specification for the already-developed Abyssal Surge static GitHub Pages campaign, correcting a rejected degraded seed. Actors: project owner accepts delivery; game-production-director owns decisions; QA owns evidence and may reject any gate; engineer owns implementation. Runtime: browser-native ES modules, static GitHub Pages, IndexedDB/localStorage, Service Worker, Node built-in test runner; there is no package.json. Inputs: current repo source and prior research under `research_shadow_lord_rts_rpg/` plus production artifacts under `_workspace/20260716-shadow-lord-rts-rpg/`. Scope: original-IP, static offline, single-player three-stage campaign, browser-local save/export/import, original reviewed static assets, optional media fallbacks, mobile/browser verification. Non-goals: accounts, cloud saves, remote APIs, analytics, WebSocket, co-op/PvP, leaderboards, payments, backend anti-cheat, deployment of raw generators or credentials, runtime meshes/rigs, TWA/APK until a separately approved web-release evidence gate. Acceptance evidence must use only commands already present: `node --check app.js`; `node --check campaign-state.js`; `node --check sw.js`; `node --test tests/campaign-state.test.mjs`; plus browser evidence against the deployed Pages URL. The source contains no package.json: `npm run stage1:gate` and `npm run gate:stage1` are invalid nonexistent commands and must never be acceptance criteria or aliases. Any aggregate G1–G8 measurement absent from recorded evidence remains NOT-RUN, never PASS. Do not invent numerical threshold evidence. Return a seed only when no fake command, bogus tool capability, invented external integration, or unresolved human choice remains.
Project owner accepts; director decides; QA independently rejects gates; engineer implements.
Static HTML/CSS/JS repo, research_shadow_lord_rts_rpg, _workspace production artifacts, deployed Pages evidence.

Deliver both: create a repository file at `docs/immutable-spec-abyssal-surge-campaign.seed.md` and include the exact same immutable seed text as a single fenced `text` block in the final response. Deliver both: a single final `seed` text block and the identical repository file `_workspace/20260716-shadow-lord-rts-rpg/abyssal-surge-immutable-spec.seed.md`. Failure mode: delivery is rejected if either artifact is missing, their contents differ byte-for-byte, or the file contains invalid acceptance commands such as `npm run stage1:gate` or `npm run gate:stage1`; verification command is `cmp -s _workspace/20260716-shadow-lord-rts-rpg/abyssal-surge-immutable-spec.seed.md /tmp/abyssal-surge-final-seed.md`, which must exit `0` with empty stdout/stderr.
